name: MinigolfPark VR
short_description: Experience VR minigolf on a variety of courses. Play by swinging the club like you would in real life by using motion controllers. Fully supports Oculus Rift and HTC Vive.
detailed_description: Welcome to MinigolfPark VR! In MinigolfPark VR you will experience playing minigolf in virtual reality on a variety of courses. No need for power meters and swing indicators. The motion controls provide a realistic experience and immersion. Currently the game features three courses with 18 holes each. The classic course will provide you with a relaxed and fun experience while the space course will challenge you with different gadgets like ufos, lasers, gravity planets and wormholes. The third course has a pirate themes and you will be challenged by rolling barrels, cannons and bombs. A multiplayer mode to play with your friends is planned to be included in a later update.
